questions.scenario: Audit sirasinda incident sonrasinda takili kalmis state lock'u `LOCK_ID` ile ac.

steps.hint_text: State lock acmak icin `terraform force-unlock` kullan.

questions.scenario: Bakim penceresinde bakim oncesi state'i JSON formatinda goster.

steps.hint_text: JSON show icin `terraform show -json` kullan.

questions.scenario: Incident triajinda troubleshooting sirasinda output degerlerini JSON olarak goster.

steps.hint_text: JSON output icin `terraform output -json` kullan.

questions.scenario: Release kontrolunde deploy sonrasi provider plugin'lerini upgrade ederek init yap.

steps.hint_text: Provider upgrade icin `terraform init -upgrade` kullan.

questions.scenario: Operasyon devrinde kesinti incelemesinde provider lock file olustur veya guncelle.

steps.hint_text: Provider checksum lock icin `terraform providers lock` kullan.

questions.scenario: On-call gorevinde yeni acilan hostta destroy plani olustur.

steps.hint_text: Destroy plan icin `terraform plan -destroy` kullan.

questions.scenario: Kesinti sonrasi runbook adiminda sadece refresh-only apply yap.

steps.hint_text: Refresh-only icin ilgili flag'i kullan.

questions.scenario: Gece vardiyasinda operasyon kontrolunde remote veya local state JSON'unu stdout'a cek.

steps.hint_text: Ham state cekmek icin `terraform state pull` kullan.

questions.scenario: Audit sirasinda incident sonrasinda state icinde kaynak adresini yeniden adlandir.

steps.hint_text: State tasimasi icin `terraform state mv` kullan.
